name: Butterscotch Bread Puddings
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter two 1 1/4-cup ramekins and divide bread cubes between them.
3. In a small saucepan, heat half-and-half, butter, salt, and vanilla over moderate heat until hot.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together sugar, egg, and yolk. Gradually add the hot mixture to the saucepan, whisking continuously.
5. Pour the mixture over the bread cubes and bake in the middle of the oven until puffed and golden, about 25 to 30 minutes.
6. Serve puddings warm with ice cream.
